description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal suit with a long tailcoat, waistcoat, and bow tie, exuding a classic, vintage style. The suit features a boutonnière on the left lapel, adding a touch of elegance and suggesting a special occasion or formal event. The figure has a full beard and medium-length, wavy hair, giving him a distinguished and somewhat artistic appearance. His hands are relaxed and open at his sides, and he stands in a neutral, upright posture. The shoes are formal and match the overall attire, completing the sophisticated look. The overall build and proportions are realistic, with attention to detail in the clothing folds and accessories.
description: A formally dressed male adult in a vintage suit with a tailcoat, waistcoat, bow tie, boutonnière, and formal shoes, standing upright with a distinguished appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed suit, boutonnière, bow tie, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the tail of the coat, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tailcoat, hair, and the symmetrical stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, boutonnière, and the length of the coat's tail.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with tailcoat, waistcoat, dress shirt, and bow tie
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length wavy hair with full beard
